summary: Full testing of Admin Panel and Portfolio features. Admin login returns role=admin, admin page shows Users/Chat/Stats sections with password toggle and user deletion. Regular users cannot see admin link and get Access Denied on /admin. Portfolio moved to separate sidebar menu with HOLD/ALTs/HI_RISK group filters working correctly. All backend admin APIs and portfolio API tested and passing.
seed_data_creation: Used existing admin@rukos.crypto and test@test.com accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel and portfolio features fully tested. Admin endpoints return raw_passwords. Portfolio endpoint returns MOCK data with HOLD/ALTs/HI_RISK groups. All tests use data-testid selectors.

features_tested.admin_users_list: PASS - Shows users with raw_passwords, toggle, delete buttons
features_tested.admin_delete_user: PASS - Can delete non-admin users, cannot delete admins
features_tested.admin_chat_messages: PASS - List and delete chat messages
features_tested.admin_403_for_non_admin: PASS - Regular users get 403 on admin endpoints
features_tested.admin_link_visibility: PASS - Only admin users see Admin link in sidebar
features_tested.admin_access_denied: PASS - Regular users see Access Denied on /admin page
features_tested.portfolio_in_sidebar: PASS - Portfolio is separate menu item
features_tested.portfolio_filters: PASS - All Groups/HOLD/ALTs/HI RISK filters work
features_tested.portfolio_positions: PASS - BTC/ETH in HOLD, SOL in ALTs, PEPE in HI_RISK

mocked_data_note: Portfolio groups return MOCK positions data from server.py - not user-specific portfolio data
